title: Easy Crunchy Australian Lamb Skewers
description: Savory and crunchy lamb skewers with a praline crust, perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired dinner, and a great hangover cure. This dish features a mix of Australian and French flavors.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, thyme, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the praline paste onto the lamb pieces.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh thyme and lemon wedges.
